name: Piri-Piri Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the olive oil into a small, screw-top jar.
2. Add the chili peppers (without their tops), bay leaf, and lemon rind to the jar.
3. Secure the lid tightly on the jar.
4. Shake well to combine all ingredients.
5. Allow the mixture to stand in a warm place for at least 24 hours before using.
6. The sauce can be stored at room temperature indefinitely.
Ready-made Piri-Piri sauce can be purchased by the Portuguese, who use it frequently as a spicy condiment over pasta, fish, or meat dishes, and also to flavor stews.
